creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #25)
> If necessary, I can help with the port - contact me.

Thank you for offering your help: I will really need it when adopting this really difficult port!

> And I only did this PR at Älven's request, so it's better for him to become a maintainer.

P.S. Please, s/him/her/ :)
Or at least, don't call me "he": I identify myself as female :)

Älven: she/her (while swedish word "älven" meaning "river" is of common gender, me is female :)
